prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年综合类最低位次约13945→16716→24346→18158→16797，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年因特殊原因位次大幅下滑至24346，2024年回升至18158，2025年进一步回升至16797。近两年位次持续前移（数字减小），显示报考热度回升，2025年基准位次约16797名；该校在山东省招生计划逐年增加：2021年206人、2022年213人、2023年213人、2024年223人、2025年235人、2026年260人。2026年较2025年扩招25人（+10.6%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在29-32名（2026年第31名），属于国内顶尖高校行列，综合实力强劲；该校在声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情事件，抖音热度总排名第16（高热），综合热度约310万，短视频平台曝光度较高，反映考生关注度较高。历史投档无异常记录，报考心理稳定；第五轮学科评估中，化学获评A，机械工程、工商管理获评A，土木工程、应用经济学、控制科学与工程、电气工程、计算机科学与技术获评A-，共8个A-/A/A学科，工科与管理学科实力均衡，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度匹配，吸引高分考生报考。山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万，较2025年68.1万增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，非山东省内高校，无本地招生倾斜。该校在山东省招生计划持续增加，体现对山东生源的重视，但跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16797、2026年扩招10.6%使位次后移、山东省考生增加5.7%加剧竞争、抖音高热反映关注度上升等因素，预计2026年录取位次较2025年小幅后移（数字增大）。预测最低位次约17919名，区间17419-18419名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for comprehensive subjects was approximately 13945 → 16716 → 24346 → 18158 → 16797, showing an overall fluctuating and then backward trend. In 2023, due to special reasons, the ranking dropped significantly to 24346, rebounded to 18158 in 2024, and further recovered to 16797 in 2025. In the past two years, the ranking has been moving forward (decreasing numbers), indicating a recovery in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 16797. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province has been increasing year by year: 206 in 2021, 213 in 2022, 213 in 2023, 223 in 2024, 235 in 2025, and 260 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the enrollment in 2026 will increase by 25 students (+10.6%), a relatively large expansion, which will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable at 29-32 in recent years (31st in 2026), placing it among the top universities in China with strong comprehensive strength. The university has not experienced any significant negative public opinion incidents in reputation monitoring. Its Douyin popularity ranks 16th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 3.1 million, indicating high exposure on short video platforms and reflecting high candidate attention. There are no abnormal records in historical admissions, and the application psychology is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A, Mechanical Engineering and Business Administration were rated A, and Civil Engineering, Applied Economics, Control Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science and Technology were rated A-, totaling 8 A-/A/A disciplines. The balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines strongly attracts applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social heat, and they align well with the university's advantageous disciplines, attracting high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from 681,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, not within Shandong Province, so there is no local admission preference. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province continues to increase, reflecting its emphasis on Shandong students, but cross-provincial application popularity is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16797, the 10.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 will push the ranking backward, the 5.7% increase in Shandong candidates will intensify competition, and the high Douyin heat reflects increased attention, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will be slightly backward (larger number) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17919, with a range of 17419-18419.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17419-18419, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17000), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 18400), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.
